scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "pnpm --filter frontend run dev" "cd apps/backend && PYTHONPATH=src uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.backend:dev: cd apps/backend && PYTHONPATH=src uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.test:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run pytest tests/ -v
